posts.cookedHtml:
• Introduction
  • Define codeless test automation and its growing popularity in the industry.
  • Benefits of Codeless Automation
  • Highlight ease of use, reduced learning curve, and faster test creation.
  • Key Features
  • Discuss drag-and-drop interfaces, visual test builders, and AI-driven test generation.
  • Top Tools
  • List leading codeless automation tools and their unique features.
  • Implementation Steps
  • Outline steps for integrating codeless automation into existing workflows.
  • Best Practices
  • Share tips for maximizing efficiency and maintaining test quality.
  • Case Studies
  • Provide examples of successful codeless automation implementations.
  • Conclusion
  • Summarize benefits and encourage adoption for streamlined testing.
